programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Elsewhere
programme.desc: Seorang gadis remaja menghilang saat ingin menemui pria yang ia kenal di dunia maya demi melarikan diri dari kota kecilnya. Sahabat sang gadis merasa khawatir dan berupaya menyelidiki misteri itu.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Dig
programme.desc: Seorang ayah yang menjanda dan putrinya yang rumahnya akan dibongkar, disandera oleh pasangan berbahaya, yang tidak akan berhenti sampai mereka mengambil kembali apa yang ada di bawah properti tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.

programme.title: When English Football Ruled Europe
programme.desc: Two-part documentary series examining the years between 1977 and 1984 when three English football clubs - Liverpool, Nottingham Forest and Aston Villa - lifted the European Cup a record seven times. Featuring interviews with the stars of the victorious teams, the series reveals the remarkable stories behind the triumphs and explains how some of the most colourful characters in the game mastered Europe's foremost club competition. This part covers the break-up of Brian Clough's hugely successful Nottingham Forest, the re-emergence of Liverpool - who lifted their third and fourth European Cups in 1981 and 1984 - and the incredible story of Aston Villa, who upset all the odds to claim their one and only win in the competition in 1982.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: On the sweeping sands of Benone Strand, Dermot rolls up his trousers and wades into the sea to harvest water for salt-making. Guided by Clare from Mussenden Salt, he learns the traditional process of creating sea salt over an open fire right on the beach. Embracing ancient Irish traditions, they host a clan-style cookout, roasting meat, cheese, and vegetables over open flames as previous generations once did. Travelling on to Coleraine, Dermot joins local lobster fisherman Peter, heading out onto the water to haul in pots. With fresh lobster secured, Dermot visits LIR Seafood Restaurant, where husband-and-wife team Rebekah and Stevie champion a zero-waste approach to cooking. In the kitchen, Dermot gets hands-on, learning to prepare indulgent lobster rolls while discovering how thoughtful cooking can turn every part of the catch into something delicious.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Cult adventure comedy. The community of the peaceful coastal town of Goon Docks, Oregon faces imminent foreclosure to make way for a golf course when a band of local childhood friends calling themselves the Goonies stumble upon an old map - the map provides secret clues leading to the fabled treasure of a notorious pirate known as One-Eyed Willy and sets in motion a wild mission to save their homes. With the criminal Fratelli family hot on their trail, a frantic race against time begins...

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Arriving in Derry at the end of the Causeway Coastal Route, Dermot finds a city rewriting its story, with the River Foyle as its beating heart. At the Walled City Brewery - once Army Barracks during the Troubles - he uncovers a secret local ingredient behind their standout brews. For a fresh perspective, Dermot hits the water with kayak instructor Michelle, paddling the Foyle and taking in the skyline from a whole new angle - equal parts scenic and splashy. Back on land, things get fiery on a double-decker bus-turned-taco joint. At Pyke 'N' Pommes, local legend Kevin Pyke blends bold Mexican flavours with top-notch Irish seafood. Dermot gets hands-on, prepping calamari and building tasty tacos that capture Derry's evolving food scene.

programme.desc: Emily Atack and Danny Dyer host a strategic reality quiz packed full of drama and deception. With fewer players left, and the finale looming, alliances tighten and betrayals feel inevitable. Harry reveals himself to be great at maths and this has not gone unnoticed. The game has now turned. Whispered conversations, overheard plots and shifting loyalties dominate the house as players begin thinking not about survival, but about who they want to face in the final. A maths challenge rewards bold, decisive play from Billy and delivers a powerful advantage, are Harry’s days numbered? With trust diminishing by the hour, does Kamaal succumb to group pressure or does he turn on one of the co-conspirators? Regardless, playing nicely is no longer an option.

programme.desc: Fantasy family comedy. Recently-widowed Cedric Brown struggles to control his brood of seven children, who have managed to drive away 17 different nannies with their bad behaviour - when Cedric arranges for the mysterious Nanny McPhee to come and look after the children, led by the precocious Simon, the children attempt to scare her in the same way as they have the others, but it soon becomes clear that their bad behaviour brings about supernatural and eerie reprisals... programme.title: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: Emily Atack and Danny Dyer host a strategic reality quiz packed full of drama and deception. The pressure intensifies as the final looms. A quiz produces unexpected results, leaving one player desperate to be believed for once, while Billy continues with a high-risk bluff designed to frame Harry and control the narrative. Valuation descends into chaos. Accusations fly, emotions boil over and the vote collapses into deadlock. When a rule is broken, the hosts are forced to intervene, triggering a dramatic reversal and a shock exit that reshapes the game. A final quiz redraws the leaderboard before a brutal twist is introduced: players are offered the chance to leave immediately with their winnings. As night falls, the house faces an impossible choice — risk everything, or walk away.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: The Assembly returns with never-before-seen questions and moments from across its second series. Stephen Fry reveals more about his wild past, Nicola Sturgeon bonds over Cilla Black and long johns, Rylan opens up about grief, and Anna Maxwell Martin takes on a chaotic game of question tennis. Across the episode, there are outrageous questions, poignant reflections, moments of pure joy and toilet breaks. Lenny Henry looks back on racial divides, comedy and his early career, Aitch talks family, fame and friendship, and Nicola Sturgeon reflects movingly on being child-free and the life she built outside politics. From cocaine smuggling and Supermarket Sweep secrets to EastEnders impressions, this is The Assembly - unseen and unmissable.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: The competition is heating up on The Floor - with just 57 players left, Rob Brydon hosts another tense round of quick-fire quiz duels. Each win expands a player's territory while each loss sends another home - with a 5,000-pound Floor Bonus on the line and a 50,000-pound jackpot up for grabs at the end of the series, it's all to play for as friends turn to foes and challenge each other.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Dan has been in doting boyfriend mode for some time, cementing himself firmly in Amber's good books. But how will she react when he heads out on a wild night with the boys? Will her insecurities about Dan rear their ugly head? And will her attempts to keep him in check drive him away?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The rumour about Angie's marriage has a ripple effect on the group, Meredith finds comfort in her family after a traumatic incident on the road, old issues between Lisa and Heather resurface and Monica's parenting is called into question by her own mother.

programme.title: The Floor

programme.title: The 1% Club - Soccer Aid Special

programme.title: Love, Simon

Simon has a love connection with a boy called Blue that he keeps in touch with through e-mails, but there's one problem - although Simon knows that Blue is a classmate, he has no idea who he's actually talking to. As Simon tries to discover who Blue is, he also aims to find himself and the truth of his real identity along the way...

After gatecrashing Amrita's sister Preethi's hen night, Abdulla is introduced as Amrita's new Sikh boyfriend and Preethi is beyond excited to welcome him to the family - so much so, in fact, that she insists that he comes to the wedding. Franck is less than pleased that he isn't on the list, but he is determined to make an appearance too in a bid to woo the family - meanwhile, Kathy is on notice from the coven to do away with her Abdulla problem and seeks out old friend and yoga-loving Hindu vampire Rishi. When Abdulla realises what Franck is planning, he makes a mad dash to the wedding to try and intercept him before it's too late - little does he know, though, that Shafi has also turned up to sabotage what he thinks are Abdulla's nuptials at an Indian wedding that lasts long in the memory.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Neil Dudgeon's first appearance as the head of Causton CID. John Barnaby initially rebuffs a request from Harriet Wingate, headmistress at the upmarket Darnley Park Girls School, to patrol their forthcoming classic car show, but Barnaby is intrigued when he learns that the remains of famous racing driver Duncan Palmer have been discovered at Darnley Park 40 years after he was thought to have drowned in the Lake District. Harriet is opposed to the plans of school governor Jamie Cameron and so invites his ex-wife Kate together with her father, racing legend Peter Fossett, to the show - Fossett is annoyed that his fellow judge is club DJ Dave 'Doggy' Day, who knows nothing about cars. Soon afterwards, Doggy is crushed to death under Kate's car and Barnaby thinks the video diaries of two pupils could hold clues to the killing, but a new lead takes him to meet someone at the barn where Duncan Palmer met his death. When the killer turns on him, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Family life is invading Martin's once-tranquil existence and clutter and noise is everywhere - Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James and so arranges for Martin to take James to a playgroup and sing songs with the other mums while the annoying Millie shoves a dirty sock puppet in James' face. When the parents have to pair up, James and Martin are teamed up with mum Trace and daughter Shona - Trace confides in Martin that she is worried about Shona as she is slow at grabbing objects, but Martin then infuriates Trace by saying that Shona is probably just backward. Elsewhere, Al helps Ruth move into a cottage in the village where she meets a grumpy new neighbour who doesn't want her pestering him, a woman visits the Doc with a 'mole', and Bert helps Jennifer move into his place - everything is going well until he catches her with a needle in the bathroom, and at which point Bert thinks Jennifer could be a drug addict and investigates.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is having problems sleeping and is worried about Mrs Tishell coming back to the village - she presumes that this is why Martin is up too, but Martin tells Louisa that she shouldn't be worried about Mrs Tishell's return. However, this doesn't put Louisa's mind at rest and she goes to see Ruth - who eventually agrees to pop in on Mrs Tishell - the next day. Meanwhile, Penhale embarks on a survival course in the middle of the local moors in his bid to be selected for an elite police squad and has to find his way back to Portwenn with just his initiative and Buddy the dog, the Doc attends to a beachcomber who has trodden on a shard of glass, Al and Morwenna have an internet dating disaster at a local pub, and romance blossoms for Bert and Jennifer.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A lack of experienced officers means that Chief Superintendent Innocent has asked Lewis to come out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway with his first murder investigation, a tricky case that bridges the worlds of neurosurgery, blood sports and animal rights - after an arson attack on a hunting lodge, Hathaway and new partner DS Lizzie Maddox have a dead neurosurgeon on their hands. Alastair Stoke was shot in the head on the farmland he co-owned with his troubled business partner, but the case begins to career out of control as Hathaway delves into the network of fear and loathing that surrounds the surgeon.

The team investigates the brutal murder of a wealthy man whose double life left him vulnerable to exploitation. Could his son really be the prime suspect?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: DCs Janet Scott and Rachel Bailey tackle more extreme and disturbing crimes whilst juggling their own complicated personal lives. Rachel resorts to sleeping under her desk in response to Sean's possessiveness, but finds a much more comfortable place to rest her head when Janet invites her to stay at her place. Janet prepares to take the next step in her career as sergeant, but a much younger candidate is given the role. programme.desc: Morse finds himself under suspicion when a female friend is murdered during a dress rehearsal for a performance of Mozart's The Magic Flute - the ever-loyal Lewis has his doubts when evidence incriminating Morse is discovered, but as he fights to clear his name and identify the true killer, Morse realises that his own life is in danger and that someone somewhere is out to get him. When the trail leads to a recently released convict with a grudge against Morse, a climactic showdown soon follows.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Oracle: Crime drama series. Endeavour sees in 1970 at a Venetian opera and meets a kindred spirit as a grisly murder on an Oxford towpath speaks to Thursday's intuition. [S,AD] S7 Ep1

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Miss Marple is overjoyed to be attending the wedding of her old housemaid, she finds a house full of secrets and a family desperately trying to come to terms with the fact that their brother was sent to the gallows for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and his temporary DS Jamie Winter must unravel a sinister web of lies from both past and present in order to catch a killer in the ghost village of Little Auburn, a place that has been left derelict and untouched since the Second World War. As three groups fight over the village's future, its fate rests with local landowner Roderick Craven - when one of those involved in the dispute is run over by a tank while cycling home and more deaths subsequently occur, can Barnaby find the link between them and stop the killings?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter discover just how far some people will go for power when they investigate the death of a member of the Bleakridge Watch - a local neighbourhood watch group - in the most remote village in Midsomer. The victim is local butcher Angus Colton, who was found lying frozen in his meat freezer - the police are told that that pub landlord Mitch McAllister hated Angus, but Mitch and his partner Lena claim that the Watch are a total nuisance. Later in a dark field, an old barn is set alight...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Tensions run high in Lower Pampling as a new type of cricket threatens a century of tradition - star batsman Leo Henderson wins a match for his team and takes them through to the C10 Slam tournament semi-final, but he is then found dead in the practice area pummelled by cricket balls later that day. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate the death of the star cricketer during a tournament which draws them into a dangerous game - Barnaby learns that C10 is not everyone's cup of tea and council members who hate its vulgarity plan a village vote to decide whether it stays, but could the dislike of a cricket format really be a motive for murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Under cover of darkness, local estate agent Seb Huntington releases animals from their cages at the Belville Small Pet Show - someone confronts Seb and the following morning Ailsa Benson arrives to set up her pet food stall to find Seb dead surrounded by escaped bunnies... Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Dr Oliver Marcet and learn that the victim died from a stab wound to the neck - hearing Ailsa Benson's alibi, Barnaby and Winter next interview Seb's distraught girlfriend Tegan Langton and her boss Delphi Hartley. Finding no reason anyone would want to harm Seb or sabotage the show, they leave Tegan to be comforted by best friend Shray Varma watched from afar by the mysterious Errol Judd. When Winter gleans from Seb's computer that he was sabotaging the show, Barnaby posits that someone murdered Seb to stop him - was this a case of a rivalry taken too far, or is the killer driven by something darker?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A missing girl and a murdered student set Vera on an investigation that triggers memories from her own childhood.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse is called in to investigate when a wealthy American tourist who apparently fell victim to a heart attack is found dead in her hotel - the Oxford detective discovers that her death is linked to the disappearance of a priceless Anglo-Saxon antiquity called the Wolvercote Tongue from the Ashmolean Museum.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Arthur's bike breaks down and threatens Stan's plans for a day out with the girls.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Second Time Around: The mysterious death of a former Deputy Police Commissioner leads Morse to work with an old professional rival on an 18-year-old murder case. [SL,S,AD] S5 Ep1

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Rosemary's maternal side is brought out when she and Laura find an abandoned baby under a gooseberry bush in Penelope Braxton's garden - Penelope is remarrying her ex-husband Tim and our heroines are working on a memorial garden as an intended wedding present from Penelope to Tim. Rosemary and Laura are forced to care for the baby as they try to find out who the mother is and why she would abandon him, but events take a dramatic turn when neighbouring artist Sir Carlos Potter is found murdered - how is he connected, will the girls be able to reunite mother and baby, and will Rosemary remain enchanted by the prospect of bringing up a child?

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Laura's son Matthew and his friends are on an annual tennis holiday at a beautiful tennis camp in southern Spain that is owned by former champion Ray Parfitt - meanwhile, Laura and Rosemary are creating a trophy garden for a pro-am tennis tournament that Ray is holding. When one of the players is found dead after a night out, everyone assumes that it was a drunken accident but the girls suspect foul play - as Rosemary rediscovers the thrill of riding motor scooters in the neighbouring village of Mija while Laura finds the local bullring to be a mysterious and threatening place, the value of property proves to be the driving force for evil in this idyllic sun-drenched resort.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. Rosemary's cousin Charles is performing with an amateur dramatic group and Rosemary and Laura have been brought along to prepare the garden of the Open Air Theatre in time for opening night - everyone is deeply shocked when one of the actors accidentally shoots himself during rehearsal, but the police then discover the gun was loaded with live ammunition and not blanks. It becomes apparent that there is a murderer in their midst - was the bullet intended for Adam, or the theatre's philanthropist Victor Channing? As Victor's wife Jenny gets stage fright, her role in the play is given to Laura to Rosemary's displeasure - with opening night fast approaching, Rosemary struggles to complete the garden on her own as Laura, who is delighted with her part, becomes more involved with the production. Will the play go without a hitch, or is someone out to sabotage it?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple investigates when her holiday at an old school friend's coastal villa is interrupted by the mysterious death of one of her fellow guests just hours after he told the ghostly tale of a murderous child.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Careful not to be seen, Samantha Berry slips away from Whitcombe Grange - while dressed in Georgian period attire - on her way to a secret rendezvous. Unaware that a drone is filming her, she is then stabbed to death by an unseen assailant... With Kam away on a course, Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Petra Antonescu and she informs them that the victim was stabbed with a feather quill pen - however, Barnaby is puzzled to find a syringe lying nearby. Tracing Samantha to the Grange, Barnaby and Winter meet owners James and Kitty Oswood - who explain that they host Jane Austen experience weekends - and Winter learns from the Oswoods' rebellious daughter Polly that Samantha kept asking questions about the house and village. When Samantha is found to be a journalist with a special interest in the local village's new delivery service for prescriptions by drone, Barnaby and Winter need to look back in time if they are to find her killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival draws in big audiences as several musicians anxiously compete for the coveted Falconer Bursary Award - shockwaves rocket though it when Jacob Wheeler is awarded the prize instead of the supremely talented Zac Sowande, but shock soon turns to horror when Jacob is found murdered strangled by violin string. Barnaby's initial investigations begin by focusing on Jacob's fellow musicians and their charismatic maestro Michael Falconer, who is using the festival to debut his Ninth Symphony while simultaneously belittling his own musician son Dan - when Barnaby realises that Jacob's Stradivarius is missing and that Jacob might not have been the completely dedicated musician his sister Natalie claims him to be, his subsequent investigations lead them deep into a world that is haunted by a potentially deadly curse.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Causton is buzzing at the opening of a new brewery on the site of a famously cursed Abbey. However, excitement turns to fear when a man is found boiled to death in one of the vats. DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are puzzled; could this really be about beer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Mahesh Sidana - a butterfly collector and founding member of an elite IQ society - is found murdered after being pinned to a wall in a manner similar to his treasured butterfly specimens, DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are thrust into a crime that impacts not only on their community, but internationally. Can they catch the culprit - with the help of an old friend - before another victim is found?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. After two young people are killed in the same way - drowned and surrounded by flowers - DCI Vera Stanhope knows that she must catch the murderer before they strike again. Aided by her team, especially her trusted right-hand man Sergeant Joe Ashworth, she unpicks the complex and dysfunctional relationships amongst a group of bird-watching friends. As the friends' loyalty turns to betrayal, Vera finds that a small act of teenage blackmail and an illicit affair may have driven someone to kill.

programme.title: Protection

After many mistakes on each station, Gordon makes a shocking decision.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: The 19th entry in the James Bond film series. Oil tycoon Sir Robert King is trying to build a pipeline along the southern end of the Caspian Sea, rivalling the large Russian lines to the north - he is murdered by Renard, a Russian terrorist who has a bullet lodged in his brain stem that makes him immune to pain. MI6 fears that King's daughter Elektra will become Renard's next target, and so Bond is assigned to protect her, but he quickly becomes suspicious about Elektra, especially when M goes missing... Meanwhile, Bond gains aid from research scientist Christmas Jones and Russian gangster Zukovsky in tracking down Renard, who is planning a nuclear disaster that threatens all of humanity.

programme.title: Mundial de Superbike - MotorLand
programme.desc: El campeonato del mundo de Superbike es una competición de motos de gran cilindrada paralela al mundial de velocidad. El calendario de 2026 consta de doce pruebas. En cada evento se disputan tres carreras puntuables.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de España
programme.desc: El Gran Premio de España vuelve fiel a su cita a Jerez, uno de los circuitos más emblemáticos del campeonato. Reconocido por su clima ideal, amplias gradas y un entorno vibrante, miles de aficionados se desplazan a Andalucía para vivir la emoción del motociclismo.

programme.title: Código MotoGP
programme.desc: Código MotoGP es un programa en el que Natacha Alfageme descubre todos los secretos de los Grandes Premios de MotoGP desde un punto de vista diferente y con imágenes en exclusiva.

programme.title: Jaque Márquez
programme.desc: Jaque Márquez transforma la temporada de MotoGP en una emocionante partida de ajedrez, donde el “rey” es Marc Márquez. Cada piloto se convierte en una pieza clave del tablero, aportando su estilo, estrategia y talento para entrar en la lucha por poner en jaque al rey.

programme.title: Código MotoGP
programme.desc: Código MotoGP es un programa en el que Natacha Alfageme descubre todos los secretos de los Grandes Premios de MotoGP desde un punto de vista diferente y con imágenes en exclusiva.

programme.title: Mundial de Superbike - MotorLand
programme.desc: El campeonato del mundo de Superbike es una competición de motos de gran cilindrada paralela al mundial de velocidad. El calendario de 2026 consta de doce pruebas. En cada evento se disputan tres carreras puntuables.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Catalunya
programme.desc: El GP de Catalunya reúne la emoción del Mundial en el Circuit de Montmeló. Velocidad, adelantamientos y máxima tensión definen una de las citas más emblemáticas del calendario. Los pilotos españoles pretenden rendir al máximo en casa.

programme.title: Inside Ducati
programme.desc: Programa que ofrece una visión entre bastidores del equipo Ducati Lenovo en la temporada de MotoGP.

programme.title: Ibiza Trail Maratón 2026
programme.desc: El Ibiza Trail Maratón es una prueba de referencia en el trail running a nivel balear, nacional e internacional.

programme.title: Ricky Rubio: El retorno de una leyenda
programme.desc: Tras años en la élite mundial, Ricky regresa al lugar donde todo empezó: el Joventut de Badalona. En esta entrevista, repasa su carrera y su lucha con la salud mental. Un regreso emocional que revela cómo recuperó la magia del baloncesto.

programme.title: Triatlón de Portocolom
programme.desc: El Triatlón Internacional de Porto Colom 2026 ofrece a los entusiastas del triatlón la oportunidad de competir en un emocionante evento en una de las ubicaciones más pintorescas de Mallorca.

programme.title: Hexagon Cup
programme.desc: La Caja Mágica de Madrid acoge la tercera edición de la Hexagon Cup. Del 28 de enero al 1 de febrero, los mejores jugadores de pádel del mundo juegan en un nuevo e innovador formato por equipos.

programme.desc: Esta es la historia del combate entre Mikey García y Sandor Martín en California, contada en primera persona por el boxeador español, quien hizo realidad su sueño de niño.

programme.title: Inside Ducati

programme.title: Red Bull Rookies Cup
programme.desc: La Red Bull MotoGP Rookies Cup es una excelente cantera de pilotos. La competición se fundó en 2007 y, desde entonces, muchos de los participantes han progresado hacia el Mundial de motociclismo. Esta temporada cuenta con 7 rondas y 14 carreras.

programme.title: Hall of fame
programme.desc: El MotoGP Hall of Fame Dinner es un evento especial que se celebra durante algunos fines de semana del campeonato de MotoGP para rendir homenaje a las leyendas del motociclismo.

programme.title: Jaque Márquez
programme.desc: Jaque Márquez transforma la temporada de MotoGP en una emocionante partida de ajedrez, donde el “rey” es Marc Márquez. Cada piloto se convierte en una pieza clave del tablero, aportando su estilo, estrategia y talento para entrar en la lucha por poner en jaque al rey.

programme.title: Rueda de prensa motos
programme.desc: Los protagonistas del Mundial de motociclismo comparecen ante los micrófonos para responder a la prensa. Corredores y técnicos se comunican con los aficionados a través de las preguntas de los periodistas.

programme.title: Álex
programme.desc: En MotoGP no se regala nada y Álex Márquez ha tenido que luchar como el que más para asentarse en la parrilla. Dentro del casco se encuentra un piloto divertido con una historia que va a sorprender a muchos.

programme.title: Volver
programme.desc: Rafa Nadal, Fernando Alonso, Pau Gasol, Andrés Iniesta y Alexia Putellas analizan el camino recorrido por Marc Márquez para volver a convertirse en Campeón del Mundo.

programme.title: Volver
programme.desc: Rafa Nadal, Fernando Alonso, Pau Gasol, Andrés Iniesta y Alexia Putellas analizan el camino recorrido por Marc Márquez para volver a convertirse en Campeón del Mundo.

programme.desc: Rafa Nadal, Fernando Alonso, Pau Gasol, Andrés Iniesta y Alexia Putellas analizan el camino recorrido por Marc Márquez para volver a convertirse en Campeón del Mundo.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Italia
programme.desc: El circuito de Mugello acoge la séptima prueba del Mundial de motociclismo, el GP de Italia. El trazado toscano es icónico, con curvas rápidas y una recta principal que permite alcanzar velocidades superiores a los 350 km/h.

programme.title: La caída de Maradona
programme.desc: El 30 de junio de 1994, Diego Maradona, la mayor estrella del fútbol mundial, fue expulsado de la Copa del Mundo de EE.UU. tras no superar un control antidopaje después de un partido. La expulsión del Diego sorprendió al mundo del deporte.

programme.title: Liga F
programme.desc: El crecimiento del fútbol femenino se ve reflejado semana a semana en la Liga F, la máxima competición de clubes de España. El Barcelona, dominador de la competición durante las seis últimas temporadas, es el rival a batir. Los otros 15 equipos pretenden plantar cara.

programme.title: Premier Corner by Guiness 0,0
programme.desc: Eneko Fernández se siente a charlar con uno de los entrenadores españoles más reconocido. Quique Sánchez Flores repasa su trayectoria en 12 equipos, en 5 países diferentes, haciendo mención especial a los de la Premier League.

programme.title: Come On Fútbol!
programme.desc: Nos adentramos de lleno en la vida de Dani Olmo, un futbolista comprometido con las causas sociales. El atacante español es integrante activo de la iniciativa 'Common Goal', una organización que se centra en ayudar a los afectados por las consecuencias de la guerra en los Balcanes. Su compromiso para mejorar el mundo es total.

programme.title: Premier League Features
programme.desc: Repaso en general con todo lo relacionado con la Premier League.

programme.title: Premier Corner by Guiness 0,0
programme.desc: El programa habla con Santi Cazorla. El futbolista del Real Oviedo repasa su trayectoria en aquel Arsenal de Wenger donde alcanzó su mejor nivel.

programme.title: Liga F
programme.desc: El crecimiento del fútbol femenino se ve reflejado semana a semana en la Liga F, la máxima competición de clubes de España. El Barcelona, dominador de la competición durante las seis últimas temporadas, es el rival a batir. Los otros 15 equipos pretenden plantar cara.

programme.title: Liga Europea de la EHF
programme.desc: La Liga Europea ocupa el segundo lugar en el escalafón de las competiciones continentales de balonmano. Comienza con una fase de clasificación, seguida de una fase de grupos; los mejores, pelean por el título en las eliminatorias.

programme.title: El Fenómeno
programme.desc: El Fenómeno era el niño prodigio que lo tenía todo. Campeón del Mundo a los 17 años. Mejor jugador del año a los 20. Dos veces récord mundial de un traspaso a los 21. Impresionantes goles allá donde jugó. Y entonces, todo le fue brutalmente arrebatado.

programme.title: Martinator, voluntad de hierro
programme.desc: Escuchaba el rugido de los motores del Jarama desde su habitación y ahora pelea por ser campeón de MotoGP. Jorge Martín ha superado todos los límites de un deportista de élite para escalar la cima del motociclismo mundial.

programme.title: MotoGP - GP de Italia
programme.desc: El circuito de Mugello acoge la séptima prueba del Mundial de motociclismo, el GP de Italia. El trazado toscano es icónico, con curvas rápidas y una recta principal que permite alcanzar velocidades superiores a los 350 km/h.

programme.title: Rookies
programme.desc: Historias de los debutantes del Campeonato del Mundo de MotoGP, cada uno con un relato increíble que contar. No hay lugar más difícil para dejar huella que MotoGP.

programme.title: Fabio Quartararo, el camino hacia la redención
programme.desc: The Redemption Road sigue a Fabio Quartararo, una de las estrellas más carismáticas de MotoGP, y a Yamaha en su lucha por volver a la cima de este deporte.

programme.title: La NBA, en primera persona desde Berlín
programme.desc: ¿Cómo es vivir un partido de la NBA desde dentro? Atiga Suleiman tuvo el placer de estar presente en el encuentro entre Orlando Magic y Memphis Grizzlies que se disputó en Berlín el pasado mes de enero.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Horror Banget
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Jin Qorin
programme.desc: Seno (Marthino Lio) sangat mencintai istrinya Alya (Tyara Vanessa) dan putrinya Reva (Kanaya Gleadys). Tetapi, ada rahasia besar yang harus ditutupi Seno di dalam rumah tangganya

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Love Daddy
programme.desc: Perjuangan 3 orang ayah dalam mengasuh anak remajanya. Meski memiliki pola asuh yang berbeda, namun mereka memiliki satu kesamaan: rasa sayang dan kekhawatiran yang berlebihan terhadap anak-anaknya.

programme.title: Warkop Reborn 4
programme.desc: Dijatuhi hukuman gantung di pusat kota, Warkop DKI berhasil melarikan diri ke Maroko. Di sana mereka bertemu seseorang yang mengendalikan jaringan mata-mata anak-anak. Mereka berhasil mengetahui keberadaan Inka di sebuah riad.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose S2
programme.desc: APOSE Pindah Kantor menceritakan bagaimana Wendi memulai perjalanannya menjadi seorang podcaster yang menyaingi Surya Insomnia sebagai senior podcaster di kantor Apose yang baru

programme.title: Hidayah
programme.desc: Terbongkarnya masa lalu Bahri sebagai napi membuat warga Mekarwangi mengusirnya. Untuk menyelamatkan dirinya dan desanya, Bahri berusaha mendapatkan kembali bimbingannya dan memperkuat imannya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Haji Backpacker
programme.desc: Mada memberontak kepada Tuhan, karena sudah merenggut ibunya. Ia juga kehilangan cinta yang membuatnya patah hati. Marah pada kenyataan, ia kemudian memutuskan untuk menjadi backpacker dan hidup bebas.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Cinta Untuk Dimas
programme.desc: Melihat kondisi Dimas Ahmad yang terlihat lesu, Raffi dan Nagita menyimpulkan bahwa Dimas butuh seseorang untuk menjadi penyemangat dan memberikan misi besar untuk Dimas, bernama Cinta Untuk Dimas.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Ikhlas Paling Serius
programme.desc: Drama romantis yang mengikuti Fajar, seorang people pleaser yang menjadi asisten pribadi Farah, CEO perfeksionis. Fajar terjebak dilema saat ditugaskan memata-matai Farah, namun justru jatuh cinta dan terlibat konflik rumit.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Cerita Dokter Cinta
programme.desc: Kisah Dokter Obgyn Ryan, Lana , Tiara, Jarwo, Leon, Acho, Anissa dalam membantu persalinan pasien dan mengatasi persoalan cinta di antara mereka yang penuh konflik.

programme.title: Montase
programme.desc: Program magazine tentang movie & series review, menghadirkan para cast dan mengkombinasikan game show

programme.title: Ikatan Cinta
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang memang tidak pernah baik menjadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin.

programme.title: 99 Cahaya Di Langit Eropa
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan pengalaman nyata sepasang mahasiswa Indonesia yang kuliah di Eropa. Bagaimana mereka beradaptasi, bertemu dengan berbagai sahabat hingga akhirnya menuntun mereka pada rahasia besar Islam di benua Eropa.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call
programme.desc: Video Call, salah satu cara Vidi terus berkomunikasi dengan para sahabatnya selama masa pandemi. Santai namun mendalam, membeberkan segala isu dan fakta, termasuk hal-hal sensitif dari sahabat Vidi

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Ckckck
programme.desc: Menjelajahi kompleksitas hubungan modern dengan perpaduan drama dan komedi. Dimana situasi itu membuat orang bereaksi ck.ck.ck.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: MD Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
MD Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
MD Series: Keluarga Yang Tak Dirindukan
Edge of Tomorrow
एज़ ऑफ टूमारो
எட்ஜ் ஆஃப் டுமாரோ
ఎడ్జ్ ఆఫ్ టుమారో
एज ऑफ टुमारो
programme.desc: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.
योद्धा रीटा व्रतस्की की मदद से, मेजर विलियम केज को समय के चक्र में फँसकर पृथ्वी और मानव जाति को एक विदेशी प्रजाति से बचाना पड़ता है।
ரீட்டா வ்ரட்ஸ்கி உதவியோடு கால வளையில் சிக்கிய மேஜர் வில்லியம் கேஜ் ஏலியன்களிடமிருந்து பூமியை காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும்.
యోధుడు రీటా వ్రటాస్కి సహాయంతో, మేజర్ విలియం కేజ్ గ్రహాంతర జాతుల నుండి భూగ్రహాన్ని, మానవజాతిని రక్షించాలి.

programme.title: Pay Day
पे डे
பே டே
పే డే
पे डे
programme.desc: A bricklayer's plans of having a fun weekend go for a toss when he finds it difficult to reach home during a downpour. When he finally reaches home, he realises that his wife is angry with him.
एक मिस्त्री की सप्ताहांत बिताने की योजनायें तब धरी की धरी रह जाती हैं जब उसे बारिश में घर पहुँचने में मुश्किल होती है। जब वह आखिरकार घर पहुँचता है, तो उसे पता चलता है कि उसकी पत्नी उससे नाराज़ है।
வாரக்கடைசியை கொண்டாடும் கொத்தனாரின் திட்டம் பயங்கர மழையால் தோல்வியடைகிறது. அதனால் அவரது மனைவி அவர் மீது கோபமடைகிறாள்.
వారాంతాన్ని సరదాగా గడపాలని ఒక ఇటుక పనివాడు చేసే ప్రణాళికలు, భారీ వర్షంలో ఇంటికి చేరుకోవడం కష్టంగా మారుతుంది.

programme.title: The Circus
द सर्कस
த சர்கஸ்
ద సర్కస్
द सर्कस
programme.desc: The Tramp is hired by the proprietor of a circus after he stumbles into the middle of a performance and becomes the star attraction. He ends up falling in love with a horse rider.
ट्रम्प को एक सर्कस के मालिक द्वारा काम पर रखा जाता है, जब वह एक प्रदर्शन के बीच में ठोकर खाता है और स्टार आकर्षण बन जाता है। वह एक घुड़सवार से प्यार करने लगता है।
சர்க்கஸில் நிகழ்ச்சியின் நடுவில் வந்து நட்சத்திரமானதால் அங்கு நியமனமாகும் நாடோடி குதிரை ஓட்டுபவளை காதலிக்கிறார்.
పొరపాటున ఒక ప్రదర్శన మధ్యలోకి పరిగెత్తి స్టార్ అట్రాక్షన్‌గా మారిన ట్రాంప్ సర్కస్‌లో ప్రదర్శన ఇవ్వడానికి నియమించబడతాడు.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
वेडिंग क्रैशर्स
வெட்டிங் க்ராஷர்ஸ்
వెడ్డింగ్ క్రాషర్స్
वेडिंग क्रॅशर्स
programme.desc: Two philanderers get stuck in a situation when one of them falls for the bridesmaid at one of the weddings that they intrude.
दो व्यभिचारी गलती से एक अनजान शादी में चलते जाते हैं और वहाँ अजीब स्थिति फंस जाते हैं, जब उनमें से एक को दुल्हन की सहेली से प्यार हो जाता है।
இரண்டு காமவெறியர்களில் ஒருவர் திருமணங்களில் மணப்பெண் தோழியைக் காதலிக்கும்போது ஒரு சூழ்நிலையில் சிக்கிக் கொள்கிறார்கள்.
ఇద్దరు ఫిలాండరర్లు ఒకరు తాము చొరబడిన పెళ్లిలో ఒక తోడిపెళ్లికూతురు ప్రేమలో పడినప్పుడు ఒక వింత పరిస్థితిలో చిక్కుకుంటారు.

programme.title: White House Down
व्हाइट हाउस डाउन
ஒயிட் ஹவுஸ் டவுன்
వైట్ హౌస్ డౌన్
व्हाईट हाऊस डाऊन
programme.desc: When terrorists suddenly invade the White House, police officer John Cale springs into action to protect his daughter and the President of the United States.
आतंकवादी अचानक व्हाइट हाउस पर हमला करते हैं, तो पुलिस अधिकारी जॉन केल अपनी बेटी और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के राष्ट्रपति की रक्षा के लिए तुरंत हरकत में आ जाता है।
பயங்கரவாதிகள் வெள்ளை மாளிகையை ஆக்கிரமித்தபோது தன் மகளையும் அமெரிக்க ஜனாதிபதியையும் பாதுகாக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும் போலீஸ்.
తీవ్రవాదులు వైట్ హౌస్ పై దాడి చేసినప్పుడు జాన్ కాలే తన కూతురిని, అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడిని కాపాడడానికి సిద్దమవుతాడు.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
स्पाइडर-मैन 3
ஸ்பைடர்-மேன் 3
స్పైడర్‌-మ్యాన్ 3
स्पाईडर-मॅन 3
programme.desc: A symbiote bonds with Peter Parker, intensifying his abilities and aggression. Now, he must face the challenges that his new powers bring while simultaneously fighting new villains.
पीटर पार्कर के साथ एक सिंबियोट जुड़ता है, जिससे उसकी क्षमताएं और आक्रामकता बढ़ जाती है। अब, उसे अपनी नई शक्तियों के साथ-साथ आगे आने वाली चुनौतियों का सामना करना होगा।
பீட்டர் பார்க்கர் என்கிற ஸ்பைடர் மேனின் மூன்றாவது வலை சாகசம்.
గ్రహాంతరవాసితోకలిసిన స్పైడర్-మ్యాన్ పీటర్ పార్కర్, సాండ్‌మ్యాన్ను ఎదుర్కొంటూ, మేరీతో విచ్చిన్నమైనబంధాన్ని కొనసాగించాలి.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: एज ऑफ एक्सटिंक्शन
ட்ரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: ஏஜ் ஆஃப் எக்ஸ்டிங்ஷன்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్: ఏజ్ ఆఫ్ ఎక్స్‌టింక్షన్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स: एज ऑफ एक्सटिंक्शन
programme.desc: Cade Yeager, a struggling single father, discovers a damaged truck which turns out to be Optimus Prime. Together with the remaining Autobots, he and his family must rise to face an impending threat.
संघर्षरत एकल पिता केड येगर को मिला एक क्षतिग्रस्त ट्रक ऑप्टिमस प्राइम निकलता है। शेष ऑटोबोट्स के साथ मिलकर, उसे और उसके परिवार को खतरे का सामना करना पड़ता है।
போராடும் ஒற்றைத் தந்தையான கேட் யேகர், ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைமாக மாறிய ஒரு சேதமடைந்த லாரியைக் கண்டுபிடிக்கிறார்.
ఒక తండ్రి కనుగొన్న ట్రక్కు ఆప్టిమస్ ప్రైమ్ గా మారుతుంది.ఆటోబాట్‌లతో కలిసి అతను,అతని కుటుంబం రాబోయే ముప్పును ఎదుర్కోవాలి.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
गॉडज़िला: किंग ऑफ द मॉन्स्टर्स
காட்ஜில்லா: கிங் ஆஃப் த மான்ஸ்டர்ஸ்
గాడ్జిల్లా: కింగ్ ఆఫ్ ది మాన్స్టర్స్
गॉडझिला: किंग ऑफ द मॉन्स्टर्स
programme.desc: A legendary monster named King Ghidorah awakens Rodan, as well as other titans, to destroy the world. To defeat them, the crypto-zoological organisation Monarch must rely on the almighty Godzilla.
पौराणिक राक्षस गिदोराह दुनिया के खात्मे के लिए रोडन और अन्य टाइटन्स को जगाता है। उन्हें हराने के लिए, क्रिप्टो-जूलॉजिकल संगठन मोनार्क, गॉडज़िला सामने लाते हैं।
அசுரன் கிடோராவால் எழுப்பப்படும் ரோடன் மற்றும் மற்ற டைட்டான்களை வீழ்த்த காட்ஜில்லாவை நாடும் கிரிப்டோ-விலங்கியல் அமைப்பு.
ప్రపంచాన్ని నాశనం చేయాలనుకునే కింగ్ ఘిడోరా, రోడాన్ లను ఓడించడానికి మోనార్క్ బృందం గాడ్జిలా, మోత్రాపై ఆధారపడాలి.

programme.title: Black Adam
ब्लैक एडम
பிளாக் ஆடம்
బ్లాక్ ఆడమ్
ब्लॅक ॲडम
programme.desc: After being granted the divine power of the Egyptian Gods and spending almost 5000 years in a guardhouse, Black Adam is freed and decides to unleash his style of justice on the world.
मिस्र के देवताओं की दिव्य शक्ति प्राप्त करने और लगभग 5000 साल एक गार्डहाउस में बिताने के बाद, ब्लैक एडम मुक्त हो जाता है और दुनिया पर अपनी न्याय शैली को लागू करने का फैसला करता है।
தெய்வீக சக்திகள் வழங்கப்பட்டு, அதற்காக சிறையில் அடைக்கப்பட்ட பிளாக் ஆடம் நவீன உலகில் தனது கோபத்தை வெளிப்படுத்துகிறார்.
దాదాపు 5000 ఏళ్లు ఒక గార్డుహౌస్‌లో గడిపిన తర్వాత విముక్తి పొందిన బ్లాక్ ఆడమ్ తన న్యాయశైలిని ప్రపంచానికి తెలియజేస్తాడు.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
पिरान्हा
பிரன்ஹா
పిరాన్హా 3డి
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.
भूकंप के कारण झील का तल टूट जाता है, जिससे पिरान्हा की एक प्रागैतिहासिक प्रजाति बाहर आ जाती है। मांस खाने वाली मछली के कारण भयावह घटनाएँ होती हैं, अजनबियों का एक समूह इसे रोकने के लिए एक साथ आता है।
பூகம்பத்தால் ஏரி பிளவாகி, வரலாற்றுக்கு முந்தைய காலத்திலிருந்த பிரன்ஹா இனம் வெளிவந்து தீங்கு விளைவிப்பதை தடுக்கும் குழு.
భూకంపం తర్వాత సరస్సులో నుండి విడుదల అయిన పిరాన్హాల వల్ల కలిగే రక్తపు వినాశనాన్ని ఆపడానికి అపరిచితుల బృందం జట్టుకడుతుంది.

programme.title: Shazam!
शाज़म!
ஷஜாம்!
షాజమ్!
शाझम!
programme.desc: After being abandoned at a fair, Billy constantly searches for his mother. His life, however, takes a huge turn when he inherits superpowers from a powerful wizard.
एक मेले में छोड़े जाने के बाद, बिली लगातार अपनी माँ को ढूँढ़ता रहता है। हालाँकि, उसकी ज़िंदगी में तब बड़ा मोड़ आता है जब उसे एक शक्तिशाली जादूगर से महाशक्तियाँ विरासत में मिलती हैं।
தாயை பிரிந்த பில்லி சக்திவாய்ந்த மந்திரவாதியின் சக்திகளை பெறும்போது அவரது வாழ்க்கை ஒரு பெரிய திருப்பத்தை எடுக்கிறது.
జాతరలో తప్పిపోయి, తల్లి కోసం వెతుకుతున్న బిల్లీకి ఒక మాంత్రికుడు శక్తులు ప్రసాదించడంతో అతడి జీవితం మలుపు తిరుగుతుంది.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
रश आवर थ्री
ரஷ் ஹவர் 3
రష్ అవర్ 3
programme.desc: Inspector Lee and Detective Carter arrive in Paris following an assassination attempt on Ambassador Han. There, they encounter a woman who may hold the key to uncovering the Triad's secret leaders.
राजदूत हान के हत्या के प्रयास के बाद इंस्पेक्टर ली और जासूस कार्टर पेरिस जाते हैं। वहां, वह एक महिला से मिलते हैं जिसके पास ट्रायड के गुप्त नेताओं को उजागर करने की कुंजी होती है।
தூதர் மீதான கொலை முயற்சிக்கு பின், பாரிஸுக்கு செல்லும் இருவர், இரகசியத் தலைவர்கள் பற்றி அறிந்த ஒரு பெண்ணை சந்தித்தனர்.
అంబాసిడర్ హాన్ పై హత్యాయత్నం జరిగిన తర్వాత ఇన్స్పెక్టర్ లీ మరియు డిటెక్టివ్ కార్టర్ పారిస్ కు చేరుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
घोस्ट राइडर: स्पिरिट ऑफ वेंजीयन्स
கோஸ்ட் ரைடர்: ஸ்பிரிட் ஆஃப் வெஞ்ஜன்ஸ்
ఘోస్ట్ రైడర్: స్పిరిట్ ఆఫ్ వెంజెన్స్
घोस्ट रायडर: स्पिरिट ऑफ व्हेंजन्स
programme.desc: A French monk seeks out the Ghost Rider, a superpowered antihero, for help in protecting a young boy who is being pursued by the Devil and his minions.
एक फ्रांसीसी भिक्षु, शैतान और उसके अनुयायियों द्वारा पीछा किए जा रहे एक युवा लड़के की रक्षा में मदद के लिए एक महाशक्तिशाली प्रतिनायक घोस्ट राइडर की तलाश करते हैं।
பிரஞ்சு துறவி பிசாசு மற்றும் அவனது கூட்டாளிகளால் துரத்தப்படும் சிறுவனை பாதுகாப்பதில் உதவிக்காக கோஸ்ட் ரைடரை நாடுகிறார்.
ఒక ఫ్రెంచ్ సన్యాసి దెయ్యం,అతని సేవకులు వెంబడిస్తున్న ఒక పిల్లవాడిని రక్షించడంలో సహాయం కోసం ఘోస్ట్ రైడర్ ను ఆశ్రయిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Troy
ट्रॉय
ட்ராய்
ట్రాయ్
ट्रॉय
programme.desc: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.
ट्रोजन के राजकुमार पेरिस का मेनेलॉस की पत्नी हेलेन के साथ प्रेम प्रसंग होता है, और वह उसे अपने साथ ले जाने का फैसला करता है। बाद में, मेनेलॉस का भाई इसी बहाने ट्रॉय शहर के खिलाफ युद्ध छेड़ देता है।
ட்ரோஜன் இளவரசரான பாரிஸ், மெனலஸின் மனைவி ஹெலனுடன் காதல் கொண்ட பிறகு, அவளை தன்னுடன் அழைத்துச் செல்ல முடிவு செய்கிறார்.
ట్రోజన్ యువరాజు పారిస్, మెనెలాస్ భార్య హెలెన్‌ని తనతో తీసుకెళ్లగా, అదే అదనుగా మెనెలాస్ సోదరుడు ట్రాయ్ పై దండెత్తుతాడు.

programme.title: Movie
मूवी
மூவி
మూవీ
मूव्ही
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.
सर्वश्रेष्ठ फिल्में।

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
जॉन विक: चैप्टर 4
ஜான் விக்: சாப்டர் 4
జాన్ విక్: చాప్టర్ 4
programme.desc: Assassin John Wick faces a new and powerful enemy as he fights for his freedom.
हत्यारा जॉन विक हाई टेबल तक अपना रास्ता लड़ने और लंबे समय से चाही गई आजादी हासिल करने के मिशन पर है। हालांकि, एक नया दुश्मन उसके रास्ते में खड़ा है जिसकी ताकत उसके पुराने दोस्तों को दुश्मन बनाती है।
கொலையாளி ஜான் விக், ஹை டேபிளுக்குச் சென்று நீண்டகாலமாக எதிர்பார்க்கப்பட்ட விடுதலையைப் பெற ஒரு பணியில் ஈடுபட்டுள்ளார்.
తన చిరకాల స్వేచ్ఛను సంపాదించుకునే హంతకుడు జాన్ విక్ లక్ష్యానికి శక్తివంతమైన ఒక కొత్త శత్రువు అడ్డుగా నిలుస్తాడు.

programme.title: Live - The Love Laugh Live Show

programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.

इन्कमिंग
programme.desc: Imprisoned at the International Space Station, a group of terrorists manages to escape confinement and take control of the ship. However, their mission to target the Soviets threatens world peace.
आतंकवादियों द्वारा एक अंतरिक्ष स्टेशन पर कब्ज़ा करने के बाद उनका अगला लक्ष्य मास्को शहर है। एक शटल पायलट और एक नया डॉक्टर उन्हें रोकते हैं, जबकि एक दुष्ट सीआईए एजेंट के योजनाओं से यह जटिल हो जाता है।
விண்வெளி நிலையம் மூலம் மாஸ்கோவை தாக்கும் தீவிரவாதிகளை பைலட்டும் மருத்துவரும் தடுக்க, சிக்கலாக்கும் சி‌ஐ‌ஏ முகவர்.
మాస్కోను లక్ష్యంగా చేసుకుని ఒక అంతరిక్ష కేంద్రాన్ని ఆక్రమించుకున్న ఉగ్రవాదులను ఒక షటిల్ పైలట్, ఒక వైద్యుడు అడ్డుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
टीनेज म्यूटेंट निंजा टर्टल्स
டீன்ஏஜ் ம்யூட்ன்ட் நிஞ்சா டர்டில்ஸ்
టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా టర్టల్స్
टीनेज म्युटंट निंजा टर्टल्स
programme.desc: As a powerful crime lord threatens New York City, a team of mutant turtles trained in martial arts tries to leave their hidden lair to defend their beloved home from impending danger.
एक शक्तिशाली अपराध सरदार न्यूयॉर्क शहर को खतरे में डालता है, तब मार्शल आर्ट्स में प्रशिक्षित म्यूटेंट कछुओं की एक टीम अपने प्यारे घर को खतरे से बचाने के लिए छिपे हुए अड्डे को छोड़ने की कोशिश करती है।
நியூயார்க் நகரம் சிக்கலில் இருக்கும்போது, ​​அதை காப்பாற்றுவது நான்கு நிஞ்ஜா சண்டையிடும், சகோதரர்களின் கையில்தான் உள்ளது.
పిజ్జా ప్రియులైన టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా తాబేళ్లు ఇబ్బందుల్లో ఉన్న న్యూయార్క్ నగరాన్ని కాపాడడానికి సిద్దమవుతాయి.

programme.title: Bumblebee
बम्बलबी
பம்பல்பீ
బంబుల్బీ
programme.desc: During the Cybertron Civil War, Optimus Prime sends Autobot scout B-127 to Earth to form a base where they can regroup. Later, the scout befriends a girl named Charlie, who names him Bumblebee.
साइबरट्रॉन गृहयुद्ध के दौरान, ऑप्टिमस प्राइम ऑटोबोट स्काउट बी-127 को पृथ्वी पर बेस बनाने के लिए भेजता है। बाद में, स्काउट, चार्ली से दोस्ती करता है, जो उसे बम्बलबी नाम देती है।
சைபர்டிரான் உள்நாட்டு போரிபோது, ​​ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைம், பூமிக்கும் அனுப்பும் ஸ்கவுட் பி-127, பெண் சார்லியுடன் நட்பாகிறது.
అంతర్యుద్ధం సమయంలో, ఆప్టిమస్ పంపిన ఆటోబోట్ బి-127, చార్లీతో స్నేహం చేస్తాడు, ఆమె అతనికి బంబుల్బీ అని పేరు పెడుతుంది.

programme.title: Spider-Man
स्पाइडर-मैन
ஸ்பைடர்-மேன்
స్పైడర్-మ్యాన్
स्पायडर-मॅन
programme.desc: Peter Parker's life changes when he is bitten by a genetically altered spider and gains superpowers. He uses his powers to help people and finds himself facing the Green Goblin, an evil maniac.
मकड़ी द्वारा काटे जाने के बाद पीटर पार्कर को शरीर में बदलाव महसूस होता है।
மரபணு மாற்றப்பட்ட சிலந்தி கடித்து அதன் திறனை பெறும் உயர்நிலைப் பள்ளி மாணவர், சூப்பர் ஹீரோவாக குடும்பத்தை காக்கிறார்.
సాలీడు కరిచిన తరువాత, దాని సామర్థ్యాలు పొందిన హైస్కూల్ విద్యార్ధి, తన కుటుంబంలో విషాదం జరిగినప్పుడు సూపర్ హీరో అవుతాడు.

programme.title: Transformers
ट्रांसफॉर्मर
டிரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மார்ஸ்
ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स
programme.desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.
सैम विटविकी एक कार खरीद अनजाने में, ऑटोबोट्स और डिसेप्टिकॉन्स के बीच जीवन सृजन करने वाले उपकरण को लेकर होने वाले संघर्ष में फंस जाता है।
சாம் விட்விக்கி ஒரு காரை வாங்கும்போது, ​​ஆட்டோபாட்களுக்கும் டிசெப்டிகான்களுக்கும் இடையிலான போரில் சிக்கிக் கொள்கிறார்.
సామ్ విట్విక్కీ ఒక కారు కొన్నప్పుడు, అతను తెలియకుండానే ఆటోబాట్స్, డిసెప్టికాన్స్ మధ్య యుద్ధంలో చిక్కుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Wicked
వికెడ్
programme.desc: Elphaba and Glinda, polar opposites, become friends at Shiz University. Later, their relationship faces a crucial test when Elphaba defies The Wizard of Oz, altering both of their destinies.
ఎల్ఫాబా, గ్లిండా స్నేహితులవుతారు, ఎల్ఫాబా 'ది విజార్డ్ ఆఫ్ ఓజ్'ను ధిక్కరించినప్పుడు వారి స్నేహం సవాళ్లను ఎదుర్కొంటుంది.

programme.title: Aquaman
एक्वामैन
அக்வாமேன்
ఆక్వామ్యాన్
अॅक्वामॅन
programme.desc: Half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur is born with the ability to communicate with marine creatures. He goes on a quest to retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and protect the water world.
आधा मानव, आधा अटलांटियन आर्थर, समुद्री जीवों के साथ संवाद करने की क्षमता के साथ पैदा होता है। वह जलजीवन की रक्षा करने के लिए अटलान के पौराणिक त्रिशूल को पुनः प्राप्त करने की खोज पर निकलता है।
அட்லனின் பிரபல ட்ரைடெண்டை மீட்கவும் நீர் உலகை பாதுகாக்கவும் செல்லும் கடல் உயிரினங்களோடு தொடர்பு கொள்ளக்கூடிய அரை மனிதர்.
సగం మనిషి, సగం అట్లాంటియన్ అయిన ఆర్థర్ మహా శక్తివంతమైన అట్లాన్ త్రిశూలం చేజిక్కించుకుని, నీటి ప్రపంచాన్ని రక్షిస్తాడు.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
वंडर वुमन
వండర్ ఉమెన్
वंडर वुमन
programme.desc: Princess Diana of an all-female Amazonian race rescues US pilot Steve. Upon learning of a war, she ventures into the world of men to stop Ares, the god of war, from destroying mankind.
अमेज़ोनियन जाति की राजकुमारी डायना, अमेरिकी पायलट स्टीव को बचाती है। युद्ध की खबर मिलने पर, वह युद्ध के देवता एरेस को मानवजाति का विनाश करने से रोकने के लिए पुरुषों की दुनिया में कदम रखती है।
అమెజానియన్ జాతికి చెందిన యువరాణి డయానా మానవజాతిని నాశనం చేయకుండా ఆరెస్‌ను ఆపడానికి పురుషుల ప్రపంచంలోకి అడుగుపెడుతుంది.

programme.title: Warcraft
वॉरक्राफ्ट
వార్‌క్రాఫ్ట్
वॉरक्राफ्ट
programme.desc: A few human survivors must team up with a group of dissenting Orcs to stop an Orc horde from invading their planet through a magic portal.
जीवित बचे इंसानों को ओर्क्स के एक विद्रोही दल के साथ मिलकर ओर्क्स के झुंड को एक जादुई पोर्टल से उनके ग्रह पर हमला करने से रोकना होगा।
కొంతమంది మానవ మనుగడదారులు ఒక మాయా ద్వారం ద్వారా తమ గ్రహం మీద దాడి చేయడానికి వస్తున్న ఒక ఓర్క్ గుంపును అడ్డుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
रैम्बो: फिर्स्ट ब्लड
ராம்போ: ஃபர்ஸ்ட் ப்ளட்
రాంబో: ఫస్ట్ బ్లడ్
programme.desc: A Vietnam War veteran arrives in a small town but faces hostility from the local sheriff, leading to a tense conflict where survival instincts and combat skills take over.
वियतनाम युद्ध का एक अनुभवी सैनिक एक छोटे से शहर में आता है, लेकिन स्थानीय शेरिफ से उसकी दुश्मनी हो जाती है। इससे एक तनावपूर्ण लड़ाई शुरू हो जाती है, जिसमें जीवित रहना और युद्ध की कला हावी हो जाती है।
ஒரு வியட்நாம் போர் வீரர் ஒரு சிறிய நகரத்திற்கு வருகிறார், ஆனால் உள்ளூர் ஷெரிப்பிடமிருந்து விரோதத்தை எதிர்கொள்கிறார்.
మనుగడ ప్రవృత్తులు, పోరాట నైపుణ్యాలు గల చిన్న పట్టణానికి వచ్చిన యుద్ధ వీరుడు, స్థానిక షెరీఫ్ శత్రుత్వాన్ని ఎదుర్కొంటాడు.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
द हंगर गेम्स: द बैलेड ऑफ सॉन्गबर्ड्स एण्ड स्नेक्स
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: தி பாலாட் ஆஃப் சாங்பேர்ட்ஸ் & ஸ்னேக்ஸ்
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: ది బల్లాడ్ ఆఫ్ సాంగ్‌బర్డ్స్ అండ్ స్నేక్స్
द हंगर गेम्स: द बॅलड ऑफ सॉंगबर्ड्स अँड स्नेक्स
programme.desc: In war-torn Panem, an 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow mentors Lucy Gray Baird, a tribute for the Hunger Games. However, as he starts bonding with Lucy, Snow's fate takes a drastic turn.
युद्धग्रस्त पैनम में, 18 वर्षीय कोरिओलेनस स्नो, लूसी ग्रे बेयर्ड का मार्गदर्शन करता है, जो हंगर गेम्स की याद दिलाता है। हालाँकि, जैसे ही वह लूसी करीब जाने के बाद स्नो की किस्मत में बड़ा बदलाव आता है।
போரினால் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட பனெமில், லூசி கிரே பெயர்டை சந்தித்ததும் 18 வயது கோரியோலனஸ் ஸ்னோவின் தலைவிதி நல்லவிதமாக மாறுகிறது.
10వ హంగర్ గేమ్స్‌ గైడ్‌ కొరియోలానస్ స్నో, డిస్ట్రిక్ట్ 12కి చెందిన లూసీ గ్రేకి శిక్షణనివ్వడంలో సవాళ్లను ఎదుర్కొంటుంది.

programme.title: Movie
मूवी
மூவி
మూవీ
मूव्ही
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.
सर्वश्रेष्ठ फिल्में।
திரைப்படங்களில் சிறந்தவை.
సినిమాలలో ఉత్తమమైనది.
दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

திரைப்படங்களில் சிறந்தவை.
సినిమాలలో ఉత్తమమైనది.
दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

programme.title: Charlie Countryman
द नेसिसेरी डेथ ऑफ चार्ली कंट्रीमैन
தி நெஸ்சஸ்ரி டெத் ஆஃப் சார்லி கண்ட்ரிமேன்
ద నెసెసరీ డెత్ ఆఫ్ చార్లీ కంట్రీమన్
चार्ली कंट्रीमॅन
programme.desc: Charlie's deceased mum's spirit sends him to Bucharest, where he fulfils a promise to a fellow passenger who dies mid-flight.
चार्ली की मृत माँ की आत्मा उसे बुखारेस्ट भेजती है, जहाँ वह एक साथी यात्री से किया वादा पूरा करता है, जिसकी बीच फ्लाइट में मौत हो जाती है।
சார்லி புக்காரெஸ்ட்டில், விமானப் பயணத்தின் நடுவே உயிரிழந்த சக பயணி ஒருவருக்கு அளித்த வாக்குறுதியை நிறைவேற்றுகிறான்.
చార్లీ తల్లి ఆత్మ అతన్ని బుకారెస్ట్‌కు పంపుతుంది, అక్కడ అతను ఒక ప్రయాణికుడికి ఇచ్చిన మాటను నిలబెట్టుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Benny Dayal; The Love Laugh Live Show
द लव लाफ लिव शो
தி லவ் லாஃப் லைவ் ஷோ
ద లవ్ లాఫ్ లైవ్ షో
द लव्ह लाफ लाईव्ह शो
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.

programme.title: The Family Fang
फ़ैमिली फ़ैंग
ஃபேமிலி ஃபேங்
ద ఫ్యామిలీ ఫాంగ్
फॅमिली फॅंग
programme.desc: After the police inform them about their parents' mysterious disappearance, two siblings embark on a mission to uncover the truth.
पुलिस द्वारा उनके माता-पिता के रहस्यमय ढंग से लापता होने की सूचना दिए जाने के बाद, दो भाई-बहन सच्चाई का पता लगाने के मिशन पर निकल पड़ते हैं।
மர்மமாக காணாமல் போன தங்கள் பெற்றோரை பற்றித் தங்களுக்கு போலீஸ் தெரிவித்த பிறகு, அவர்களை தேடும் இரண்டு உடன்பிறப்புகள்.
అంతర్జాతీయ గుర్తింపు ఉన్న తమ తల్లిదండ్రులు అదృశ్యం కావడంతో అన్నాచెల్లెళ్లు రహస్యాలను వెలికి తీసేయ్ పనిలో ఉన్నారు.

programme.title: Speed Kills
स्पीड किल्स
ஸ்பீட் கில்ஸ்
స్పీడ్ కిల్స్
स्पीड कील्स
programme.desc: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.
अमीर स्पीडबोट रेसर बेन एरोनोफ़ एक गुप्त जीवन जीता है जो उसे कानून प्रवर्तन और ड्रग माफियाओं दोनों के साथ परेशानी में डाल देता है।
தன் ரகசிய வாழ்க்கையால் சட்ட அமலாக்க மற்றும் போதை கடத்தல் மன்னருடன் சிக்கலில் சிக்கும் ஒரு ஸ்பீட் போட் பந்தய வீரர்.
సంపన్న స్పీడ్‌బోట్ రేసర్ బెన్ అరోనోఫ్ రహస్య జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతాడు, అతను డ్రగ్ లార్డ్‌లతో ఇబ్బందుల్లో పడతాడు.

programme.title: The Social Network
द सोशल नेटवर्क
த சோஷியல் நெட்வர்க்
ది సోషల్ నెట్‌వర్క్
द सोशल नेटवर्क
programme.desc: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become known as Facebook, he is sued by the twins who claim he stole their idea.
वर्ष 2003 में, हार्वर्ड यूनिवर्सिटी के सेकंड ईयर के स्टूडेंट मार्क ज़करबर्ग, फेसबुक नाम का सोशल नेटवर्किंग प्लेटफॉर्म बनाते हैं। लेकिन साइट की पॉपुलैरिटी के साथ-साथ वह दो मुकदमों में भी फंस जाते हैं।
2003ல், ஹார்வர்ட் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் மாணவர் மார்க் ஜுக்கர்பெர்க் பேஸ்புக்கை உருவாக்கும்போது, சட்ட சிக்கலை சந்திக்கிறார்.
2003లో, ఫేస్‌బుక్‌ను సృష్టించిన మార్క్ జుకర్‌బర్గ్, ప్రజాదరణతో పాటు చట్టపరమైన ఇబ్బందులను కూడా ఎదుర్కొంటాడు.
मार्क झुकरबर्ग फेसबुक ही सोशल नेटवर्किंग साईट तयार करतात, तेव्हा जुळी भावंडे त्यांच्यावर चोरीचा खटला दाखल करतात.

programme.title: Southpaw
साउथपॉ
சௌத்பா
సౌత్‌పా
साऊथपॉ
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.
अपने जमाने का प्रसिद्ध चैंपियन बॉक्सर गुमनामी के अंधेरे में चला जाता है। इसके बाद, वह अपनी बेटी के लिए लड़ने और अपने लुप्त होते करियर को फिर से जीवित करने का फैसला करता है।
ஒரு விபத்தால் பேரழிவை கண்ட முன்னாள் குத்துச்சண்டை சாம்பியன் தனது மகளுக்காகவும், தொலைந்த வாழ்வை மீட்கவும் போராடுகிறார்.
తన కుటుంబాన్ని కోల్పోయిన తర్వాత నిరాశకు గురైన బాక్సర్ బిల్లీ హోప్ మాజీ బాక్సర్‌ను కలిసినప్పుడు తనలో విశ్వాసం కలుగుతుంది.

programme.title: Gangs of New York
गैंग्स ऑफ़ न्यूयॉर्क
கேங்க்ஸ் ஆஃப் நியூ யார்க்
గ్యాంగ్స్ ఆఫ్ న్యూయార్క్
गँग्ज ऑफ न्यू यॉर्क
programme.desc: After witnessing the horrifying murder of his father, a young man sets out to seek retribution and attempts to bring down a crime lord.
अपने पिता की भयानक हत्या देखने के बाद, एक युवक बदला लेने की ठान लेता है और अपराध सरगना को गिराने का प्रयास करता है।
தனது தந்தையின் கொலையைக் கண்ட பிறகு, ஒரு இளைஞன் பழிவாங்குவதற்காக புறப்பட்டு, ஒரு குற்றத் தலைவனை வீழ்த்த முயற்சிக்கிறான்.
ముఠా గొడవలో హత్యకు గురైన తన తండ్రి మరణానికి ప్రతీకారం తీర్చుకోవడానికి ఒక యువకుడు, నేరస్థుడిని అంతం చేయాలనుకుంటాడు.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
किल बिल वॉल - ll
கில் பில் வோல் - II
కిల్ బిల్: వాల్యూమ్ 2
किल बिल व्हॉल्यूम - ll
programme.desc: The Bride, who's now pregnant, sets off to kill her ex-boss and lover Bill, his brother, Budd the bouncer, and one-eyed Elle.
ब्राइड कूटनाम की गर्भवती महिला अपने पूर्व-बॉस, बिल को मारने के लिए निकलती है और डेड्ली वाइपर्स असासिनेशन स्क्वाड से बचे हुए उसके भाई, बड और एली ड्राइवर को निशाना बनाती है।
தனது முன்னாள் முதலாளியான பில்லை கொல்ல புறப்படும் கர்ப்பமான பெண் ப்ரைட், உயிர் தப்பிய தனது இரு சகோதரர்களை குறிவைக்கிறார்.
గర్భవతి అయిన ఒక వధువు తన మాజీ యజమాని, ప్రియుడైన బిల్, బౌన్సర్ అయిన అతడి సోదరుడు బడ్, ఒంటికన్ను ఎల్లే ని చంపాలనుకుంటుంది.
ब्राइड नावाने ओळखली जाणारी एक महिला डेडली व्हायपर्स असॅसिनेशन स्क्वॉडमधील बिल, त्याचा भाऊ बड व एल यांना संपवू पाहते.

programme.title: Big Eyes
बिग आइज़
பிக் ஐஸ்
బిగ్ ఐస్
बिग आईज
programme.desc: The husband of Margaret Keane, a phenomenal painter, wrongfully claims credit for her works and enjoys her success until a legal battle between the two reveals the truth to the world.
मार्गरेट कीन, एक प्रसिद्ध चित्रकार, अपने पति द्वारा उसकी कलाकृति का श्रेय लेने के बाद अपनी प्रसिद्धि को पुनः प्राप्त करने के लिए संघर्ष करती है।
தன் கலைப்படைப்புக்கான பெருமையை தன் கணவர் பெற்ற பிறகு தன் புகழை மீட்டெடுக்க போராடும் புகழ்பெற்ற ஓவியரான மார்கரெட் கீன்.
మార్గరెట్ కీనే చిత్రాలను తన చిత్రాలుగా చెప్పుకొని పేరు సంపాదించిన ఆమె భర్తకు, ఆమెకు మధ్య న్యాయ పోరాటం మొదలవుతుంది.

programme.title: Poseidon
पोसीडन
பொசைடன்
పొసైడన్
पोसायडन
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, the luxury ocean liner Poseidon capsizes after being swamped by a rogue wave. Later, the survivors are left to fight for their lives as they attempt to escape the sinking ship.
नए साल की शाम को, लग्ज़री ओशन लाइनर पोसाइडन एक खतरनाक लहर में फंसने के बाद पलट जाता है। बाद में, बचे हुए लोग डूबते जहाज़ से भागने की कोशिश करते हुए अपनी जान बचाने के लिए लड़ते हैं।
ஆடம்பர கடல் லைனர் போஸிடான் கவிழ்ந்தில் தப்பியவர்கள் மூழ்கும் கப்பலில் இருந்து தப்பிக்க உயிருக்கு போராடுகிறார்கள்.
ఒక పెద్ద అల, పొసైడన్ అనే విలాసవంతమైన నౌక‌ను త‌ల‌కిందులు చేసినప్పుడు ప్రాణాలతో బయటపడిన వారు తమ ప్రాణాల కోసం పోరాడుతారు.

programme.title: The Runner
द रनर
த ரன்னர்
ది రన్నర్
द रनर
programme.desc: A politician's life is thrown into turmoil when a scandal emerges. His team scrambles to save his reputation and mitigate the damage.
एक राजनेता के घोटाला के सामने आने पर उसके जीवन में उथल-पुथल मच जाती है। उसकी टीम उसकी प्रतिष्ठा को बचाने और नुकसान को कम करने के लिए संघर्ष करती है।
ஊழல் வெளியானதில் கொந்தளிப்பான அரசியல்வாதியின் நற்பெயரைக் காப்பாற்றவும் சேதத்தைத் தணிக்கவும் அவரது குழு போராடுகிறது.
సెనేట్‌కు పోటీ చేయాలని కలలుకనే కోలిన్ ప్రైస్, సెక్స్ స్కాండల్‌లో చిక్కుకున్నప్పుడు అతడి కెరీర్, ఆశయాలు ప్రమాదంలో పడతాయి.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
स्टैंड अप गाइज़
ஸ்டாண்ட் அப் காய்ஸ்
స్టాండ్ అప్ గైస్
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.
एक बूढ़े गैंगस्टर की जेल से रिहाई के बाद उसका अपने दो आपराधिक साथियों से पुनर्मिलन होता है, जिनमें से एक को उसे मारने का आदेश मिला होता है।
ஒரு வயதான கும்பல் சிறையில் இருந்து விடுதலையானது, தனது இரண்டு கூட்டாளிகளுடன் மீண்டும் இணைவதற்கு வழிவகுக்கிறது.
జైలు నుండి విడుదలైన గ్యాంగ్‌స్టర్ తన ఇద్దరు భాగస్వాములను తిరిగి కలవగా, వారిలో ఒకరికి అతడిని చంపమని ఆదేశాలు వస్తాయి.

programme.title: The Pianist
द पियानिस्ट
தி பியானிஸ்ட்
ది పియానిస్ట్
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.
एक यहूदी संगीतकार का विशेषाधिकार प्राप्त जीवन जर्मनी पर नाज़ी आक्रमण के साथ समाप्त हो जाता है, जिसके बाद उसे होलोकॉस्ट की भयावहता को सहना पड़ता है।
ஒரு யூத இசைக்கலைஞரின் சலுகை நாஜி படையெடுப்பால் முடிவுக்கு வருகிறது; அவர் ஹோலோகாஸ்டின் கொடூரங்களை சகிக்க வேண்டும்.
జర్మనీలపై నాజీల దండయాత్రతో ఒక యూదు సంగీతకారుడి విలాసవంతమైన జీవశైలికి తెరపడడంతో, అతడు భయంకరమైన పరిస్థితులు ఎదుర్కొంటాడు.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
वुमन इन गोल्ड
விமன் இன் கோல்ட்
ఉమెన్ ఇన్ గోల్డ్
वुमन इन गोल्ड
programme.desc: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.
मारिया अल्टमैन, एक यहूदी शरणार्थी, वकील रैंडी स्कोनबर्ग के साथ मिलकर अपनी चाची की पेंटिंग को पाने के लिए मुश्किलों से गुजरती है, जिसे द्वितीय विश्व युद्ध से पहले नाजियों द्वारा जब्त कर लिया गया था।
இரண்டாம் உலக போருக்கு முன் நாஜிக்களால் கைப்பற்றப்பட்ட தனது அத்தையின் ஓவியத்தை மீட்டெடுக்க போராடும் மரியா மற்றும் ராண்டி.
మరియా ఆల్ట్‌మాన్ రెండవ ప్రపంచ యుద్ధానికి ముందు నాజీలు స్వాధీనం చేసుకున్న తన అత్త పెయింటింగ్‌ను తిరిగి పొందాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Stars!
स्टार्स!
ஸ்டார்ஸ்!
స్టార్స్!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता जीवन के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों से विभिन्न लोकप्रिय व्यक्तियों पर प्रकाश डालते हैं और स्टार बनने तक की उनकी व्यक्तिगत यात्रा पर प्रकाश डालते हैं।
பல்வேறு துறைகளைச் சேர்ந்த பல்வேறு பிரபலங்களின் நட்சத்திர நிலையை நோக்கிய அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட பயணங்களை பற்றி அறிக.
వ్యాఖ్యాత విభిన్న రంగాలకు చెందిన ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తుల గురించి వివరిస్తూ, స్టార్‌డమ్‌ దిశగా వారి ప్రయాణాలను చూపుతారు.

programme.title: DSC
डीएससी
டி‌எஸ்‌சி
డీఎస్‌సీ
डीएससी
programme.desc: Talented directors provide an entertaining insight into the most intriguing stories and anecdotes concerning some of their best works.
प्रतिभाशाली निर्देशक अपनी कुछ बेहतरीन कृतियों से संबंधित सबसे दिलचस्प कहानियों और उपाख्यानों के बारे में मनोरंजक अंतर्दृष्टि प्रदान करते हैं।
தங்களின் சிறந்த படைப்புகள் பற்றிய சுவாரஸ்யமான கதைகள் மற்றும் நிகழ்வுகள் பற்றிய தகவல்களை வழங்கும் திறமையான இயக்குனர்கள்.
ప్రతిభావంతులైన దర్శకులు వారి ఉత్తమ రచనల అత్యంత చమత్కారమైన కథలు, వృత్తాంతాలపై వినోదాత్మక అంతర్దృష్టిని అందిస్తారు.

programme.title: Stars!
स्टार्स!
ஸ்டார்ஸ்!
స్టార్స్!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता जीवन के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों से विभिन्न लोकप्रिय व्यक्तियों पर प्रकाश डालते हैं और स्टार बनने तक की उनकी व्यक्तिगत यात्रा पर प्रकाश डालते हैं।
பல்வேறு துறைகளைச் சேர்ந்த பல்வேறு பிரபலங்களின் நட்சத்திர நிலையை நோக்கிய அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட பயணங்களை பற்றி அறிக.
వ్యాఖ్యాత విభిన్న రంగాలకు చెందిన ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తుల గురించి వివరిస్తూ, స్టార్‌డమ్‌ దిశగా వారి ప్రయాణాలను చూపుతారు.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
हॉलीवुड ऑन सेट
ஹாலிவுட் ஆன் செட்
హాలీవుడ్ ఆన్ సెట్
हॉलीवुड ऑन सेट
programme.desc: The key aspects of filmmaking are explored, with behind-the-scenes insights and intriguing interviews with prominent cast and crew members.
फ़िल्मकर प्रमुख पहलुओं को पर्दे के पीछे की अंतर्दृष्टि और प्रमुख कलाकारों एवं सहायक दल के साथ दिलचस्प साक्षात्कार करते हैं।
திரைப்பட தயாரிப்பின் முக்கிய அம்சங்கள், திரைக்கு பின்னால் உள்ள நுண்ணறிவுகள் மற்றும் முக்கிய நடிகர்களுடனான நேர்காணல்கள்.
ప్రముఖ తారాగణం, సిబ్బంది ఇంటర్వ్యూలు, తెరవెనుక అంతర్దృష్టులతో చిత్రనిర్మాణానికి సంబంధించిన కీలక అంశాలు అన్వేషించబడతాయి.

programme.title: Movie
मूवी
மூவி
మూవీ
मूव्ही
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.
सर्वश्रेष्ठ फिल्में।
திரைப்படங்களில் சிறந்தவை.
సినిమాలలో ఉత్తమమైనది.
दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.

స్టార్స్!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता जीवन के विभिन्न क्षेत्रों से विभिन्न लोकप्रिय व्यक्तियों पर प्रकाश डालते हैं और स्टार बनने तक की उनकी व्यक्तिगत यात्रा पर प्रकाश डालते हैं।
பல்வேறு துறைகளைச் சேர்ந்த பல்வேறு பிரபலங்களின் நட்சத்திர நிலையை நோக்கிய அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட பயணங்களை பற்றி அறிக.
వ్యాఖ్యాత విభిన్న రంగాలకు చెందిన ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తుల గురించి వివరిస్తూ, స్టార్‌డమ్‌ దిశగా వారి ప్రయాణాలను చూపుతారు.

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v United 13/14
programme.desc: United Archives 29/3/14. The Reds were desperate to bounce back from derby disappointment when they took on Aston Villa at Old Trafford.

programme.title: 2008 UCL FInal: v Chelsea
programme.desc: 50 years after Munich, 40 years on from Wembley and 9 years after Barcelona, United take on Chelsea bidding to rule Europe for the third time.

programme.title: 1999 UCL Final v Bayern Munich
programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/99. An absolute classic, with two trophies in the bag only Bayern Munich stood between United and an unprecedented treble.

programme.title: PL: United v Liverpool 06/07
programme.desc: United Archives 22/10/06. Paul Scholes and Rio Ferdinand are both on the score sheet as United see off Rafa's Liverpool at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL: Man City v United 12/13
programme.desc: United Archives 9/12/12. Relive this unforgettable Manchester derby as United travelled to the Etihad Stadium knowing victory would leave Sir Alex Ferguson's side in pole position in the title race.

programme.title: FAC: Wimbledon v United 93/94
programme.desc: United Archives 20/2/94. United make light work of Wimbledon in this fifth round FA Cup tie.

programme.title: FAC: v Oldham 93/94 SF Replay
programme.desc: United Archives 8/4/90. United take on Joe Royle's Oldham at Maine Road after a last minute Mark Hughes goal secured a replay three days prior at Wembley.

programme.title: FAC: United v Arsenal 07/08
programme.desc: United Archives 16/2/08. Sir Alex's 100th FA Cup game in charge of United saw them take on Arsenal, one of the oldest and fiercest foes.

programme.title: PL: United v Tottenham 08/09
programme.desc: United Archives 25/4/09. United took on Tottenham knowing that victory was a must, with Liverpool desperate for the Reds to slip up.

programme.title: 2008 UCL FInal: v Chelsea
programme.desc: 50 years after Munich, 40 years on from Wembley and 9 years after Barcelona, United take on Chelsea bidding to rule Europe for the third time.

programme.title: 1999 UCL Final v Bayern Munich
programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/99. An absolute classic, with two trophies in the bag only Bayern Munich stood between United and an unprecedented treble.
